Conference on New Directions in Turkish Film Studies XXI: Cinema, Marginal, Minor and Local

The 21st New Directions in Turkish Film Studies Conference, which will be held in cooperation with Kadir Has University Faculty of Communication and hosted by Çukurova University Faculty of Communication, will be held online between October 21-23.

A single link, ID number and password has been created for all sessions of the conference. You can use the link or ID number and password below to register and participate in the sessions.

You can register for the sessions via the link below:

https://us02web.zoom.us/j/81020412348?pwd=N1ZOcE92TmxSWFNaeFhOMzg4dGFTZz09

Zoom ID 810 2041 2348 Password: TFAYY2021
